title.rendered: AMI to Join COMPUTEX TAIPEI 2019, May 28 to June 1, 2019

content.rendered:
NORCROSS, GEORGIA – AMI, a global leader in BIOS, BMC and remote management tools and utilities, is pleased to once again announce its participation in COMPUTEX Taipei 2019, held from – May 28 to June 1, 2019 at the Taipei Nangang Exhibition Center in Taipei, Taiwan.

COMPUTEX TAIPEI is a leading global ICT/IoT trade show and the second largest computer expo in the world. Thanks to Taiwan’s strong position as a strategic destination in global technology ecosystems, every year COMPUTEX attracts participation from international innovators, entrepreneurs, OEMs and ODMs from over 100 different countries.

This year, AMI will be located on the fourth floor of the Nangang Exhibition Center Hall 1 in Booth L1128. There, visitors will learn about the latest technologies developed by AMI – and how AMI provides comprehensive, end-to-end solutions that fulfill the needs of various market segments in the computing industry.

The topics presented this year at COMPUTEX by AMI will showcase the extensive depth of its product lines, ranging from Aptio® V BIOS/UEFI firmware to MegaRAC® BMC and remote management solutions, all of which are designed to make OEMs and ODMs’ development processes faster, simpler and more efficient.

Visitors to the AMI booth at this year’s COMPUTEX can expect live demonstrations and presentations of key AMI products and technologies including the newest features to its flagship Aptio® V UEFI Firmware, along with MegaRAC® SPX Service Processor BMC Firmware, MegaRAC® OSP Firmware and much more. The company will also introduce a new version of its fabric management firmware, MegaRAC® FPX2.0, a powerful NVMe over Ethernet Fabric (NVMe-oF) firmware / software stack combining Ethernet Fabric management capabilities and NVMe drive management together to create and manage a true Server SAN solution delivering highly manageable NVMe storage to remotely connected clients.

Once again, AMI warmly welcomes its customers, partners, media and guests to COMPUTEX 2019 in Booth LL128 on the fourth floor of the Nangang Exhibition Center Hall 1. For more information or to arrange a meeting with the AMI team onsite during the event, please contact AMI at 1-800-828-9264 / +1-770-246-8600 or marketing@ami.com.
